question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2025-12-21?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07460.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-12-21 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-12-11) was 11.425. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - CLERMONT-FD - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07460.D.
